name: Salpores De Arroz
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind cinnamon stick in a spice grinder until fine. Set aside.
2. Place rice flour in a large bowl.
3. Make a well in the center and add cinnamon, sugar, shortening, salt, baking powder, baking soda, and eggs.
4. Stir to mix. Slowly add enough milk to make a soft dough that will come together in a ball, resembling tortilla masa. It is easiest to get the texture right if you mix with your hands.
5. Form dough into 16 balls.
6. Place on wax paper-lined baking sheets.
7. Press each down with 2 fingers, laying flat to make 2 ridges in the dough.
8. Sprinkle with pink sugar.
9. Bake at 350°F until well browned, about 18 to 20 minutes.
